Patch Set 2:

Pierre, maybe I missing it, but I don't see useRule clause statement for data-dictionary rule in default-rules ?

Patch Set 2:

> Pierre, maybe I am missing it, but I don't see useRule clause
 > statement for data-dictionary rule in default-rules ?

Patch Set 2:

> Pierre, maybe I missing it, but I don't see useRule clause
 > statement for data-dictionary rule in default-rules ?

You're right, I figured that since there's no data-dictionary available in ONAP, I'd simply add the rule as an example to show how integration with data-dictionary can be done.  The useRule clause can be added later.
